response.justification: Strong software engineer with 15+ years of diverse development experience and proven technical leadership through open-source work and mentoring. However, this candidate is poorly aligned for this specific role: German language proficiency is only basic (critical gap for C1 requirement in Berlin-based consulting firm), and the resume lacks substantive evidence of IT architecture, UML modeling, requirements management, IT security/compliance, and team leadership at scale—all core to the Head of Development position. Better suited for a senior technical IC or software architect role.
strengths: Extensive software development across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with demonstrated ability to learn new technology stacks rapidly
Strong open-source and Linux background with published projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) aligned with firm's digital sovereignty focus
Staff-level experience and proven mentoring/leadership through workshops, talks, and organizing technical communities
concerns: German language proficiency is 'Basic' but role requires C1 level—critical barrier for client interaction and team communication in Berlin-based firm
Resume emphasizes implementation and feature development; lacks substantive evidence of IT architecture design, UML expertise, requirements management, or IT security/compliance knowledge
Limited evidence of managing and developing interdisciplinary teams; staff-level roles appear focused on individual technical contribution rather than team leadership at scale
